'''Jid'yda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Presumably an experienced [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], he was mentioned as a possible candidate to command the combined task force during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], recommended by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]]. However, the assignment fell to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after the admiral's candidacy was rejected by the rest of the [[Senate Council]].
